author: AlexChen31337
title: STATE_DIR, STATE_FILE, PLAN_FILE frozen at import time, breaking RuntimeContext.project_root override
notes: Module-level constants STATE_DIR/STATE_FILE (schema.py:312-313), PLAN_FILE (persistence.py:24), and PROJECT_ROOT (paths.py:21) are evaluated once at import time, permanently freezing to the initial cwd. This silently defeats the RuntimeContext.project_root / runtime_scope() mechanism for all default-path state and plan operations. The config layer gets this right (_default_config_file is a function), proving the codebase intends dynamic resolution. Tests must monkeypatch constants directly (test_queue_order_guard.py:86,180) as a workaround. Real bug with testability and correctness consequences.
